name: lilian-wairimu-portfolio
description: Lilian Wairimu Muriithi - Software Engineer, AI Engineer, Backend Developer & Technology Builder

scripts.build: tsc && cleancss -o dist/styles.min.css src/styles/*.css && html-minifier --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --remove-optional-tags --remove-redundant-attributes --remove-script-type-attributes --remove-tag-whitespace --use-short-doctype -o dist/index.html index.html
